hero.subtitle: Bespoke travel consulting. From the first idea to the last detail.

chiSonoIntro.p1: It all started from a personal need. I wanted to organise my trips the right way, taking care of every detail.
chiSonoIntro.p2: Over time I've travelled across every continent — Europe, Asia, the Americas, Africa — building very different experiences, always driven by a real need.
chiSonoIntro.p3: Today this is how I work: I listen, I ask questions, I try to understand what you're really looking for, and I build a trip around you.

items.title: Bespoke Itineraries
items.desc: I help you design itineraries built around the way you travel, your pace, and what you want to experience.

items.title: Pet-Friendly Trips
items.desc: I often travel with my dog and I know what it means to never leave behind those who are part of your life.

items.title: Couples, Solo, or Group Trips
items.desc: Every trip has different dynamics. I work with the people who are travelling in mind.

items.title: Selected Stays & Experiences
items.desc: I search for the most suitable accommodations, evaluate and compare them, and help you find your way.

philosophy.subtitle: Most trips are built around standard packages, pre-made offers, and generic solutions.

steps.title: Share your wishes
steps.desc: Everything starts with your ideas. Tell me what you have in mind: destinations, dates, special experiences you'd like to include.

steps.title: Receive your bespoke proposal
steps.desc: We translate your wishes into a personalised itinerary. A no-obligation proposal, designed to inspire you.

steps.title: Refine and confirm
steps.desc: Together we fine-tune the details until every element fits your vision perfectly. Every choice, carefully crafted.

steps.title: Travel with peace of mind
steps.desc: From the moment you depart until you return, I'm by your side to make sure every part of your trip goes smoothly.

pet.titleBold: Why leave at home the one who makes you feel
pet.desc: Travelling with your dog is possible and can be wonderful, if everything is organised the right way. As a <1>Travel Consultant</1> specialised in pet-friendly trips, I help you build bespoke experiences for you and your four-legged travel companion.

social.desc: Every destination tells a story. Follow me on social media to discover the trips I create and the experiences I recommend.

faq.subtitle: Here are the answers to the most common questions. If you have other curiosities, write to me through the contact form.

items.q: What kind of trips do you handle?
items.a: I design bespoke itineraries for couple, family, solo, or group trips; short weekend getaways or longer journeys. I also handle pet-friendly trips in Italy.
It always starts with an introductory consultation. Based on your needs, we define the level of support together and build the trip step by step.
No. I don't offer pre-packaged solutions: I design bespoke experiences and help you make informed choices, building the trip around your needs.
No. I help you design the trip, evaluate options, and navigate your choices. Bookings are made directly by the client.

items.q: How much does a consultation cost?
items.a: The cost depends on the type of trip and the level of support required. It's clearly defined after the introductory consultation.

items.q: Do you also handle pet-friendly trips?
items.a: Yes. I often travel with my dog and I know how much the details matter. I handle pet-friendly trips in Italy with dedicated attention: genuinely suitable accommodations, services designed for the animal's wellbeing, and an experience crafted in every aspect.
